footer.tagline: India's first AI-powered Legal First-Response System. Legal aid for every Indian citizen, simplified.

footer.disclaimer: General information only. Not legal advice.

hero.subtitle: Describe your situation in plain language. Get your legal rights, a clear action plan, and necessary documents in 60 seconds.
hero.inputPlaceholder: E.g., My employer is withholding my salary...

home.textReveal: Chitragupt will change the way you interact with Indian laws.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Select from our expert-curated categories covering everything from tenant disputes to consumer rights. No legal jargon required.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Receive a plain-language breakdown of your rights and a step-by-step strategy to resolve your situation in minutes.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Instantly generate legal notices, file RTI requests, or connect with verified lawyers to take control of your case.

featured.label: Common Issues
featured.title: Start with your problem. We'll handle the law.

reviews.title: What our citizens say about us

aiSection.title2: Our AI finds your legal leverage.
aiSection.desc: Drag and drop your rent agreement, termination letter, or police complaint. Chitragupt will instantly analyze it against Indian law to determine your strongest course of action.

credibility.text: Referenced from IPC, CrPC, Consumer Protection Act, IT Act, and 50+ Indian laws

issues.selectSituation: Select a situation above to see your rights and next steps

lawyers.pageSubtitle: Connect with pro-bono lawyers and legal aid organizations across India. Every citizen has a right to justice.
lawyers.noResultsDesc: Try expanding your search by changing the practice area or city.
lawyers.governmentLegalAidDesc: Every Indian citizen has the right to free legal aid under the Legal Services Authorities Act, 1987. If you cannot afford a lawyer, the government will provide one for you.

dlsa.title: DLSA / SLSA
dlsa.desc: District/State Level Legal Services for SC/ST, women, children, and victims of disaster.

nalsa.title: NALSA Helpline
nalsa.desc: 24/7 National hotline for free legal advice and representation. Call 15100 now.

hc.title: HC Legal Committee
hc.desc: For cases pending in High Courts. Available at every state High Court.

analyze.pageSubtitle: Upload your documents. Our AI reads them and finds your legal leverage against Indian law.
analyze.orBrowse: or click to browse from your device
analyze.privacyNote: Your documents are processed securely and deleted from our servers immediately after analysis.

emergency.pageSubtitle: If you are in immediate danger or facing sudden police action, tap the numbers below.
emergency.dkBasuText: The police official carrying out the arrest must wear an accurate, visible name tag with their designation.
emergency.rightToInformText: You have the absolute right to have one friend, relative, or person known to you informed about your arrest and the location where you are being held.
emergency.twentyFourHourText: You cannot be held in police custody for more than 24 hours without being presented before a Magistrate.
emergency.womensRightsText: Women cannot be arrested between sunset and sunrise, except in exceptional circumstances and only with written permission from a Magistrate. A female officer must be present.

documents.title: Generate Legal Documents
documents.subtitle: Professional legal notices in 60 seconds. Download as PDF. Vetted by Indian Advocates. Available in Hindi and English.
documents.successTitle: Success! Your Legal Notice is Ready
documents.successDesc: Sending this notice is often enough — 68% of disputes are resolved without ever going to court.
documents.byRegPost: By Registered Post with Acknowledgment Due (RPAD)
documents.fact1: Under the specific instructions of my client, I hereby serve you with this Legal Notice in relation to the following facts:
documents.fact2: 1. That you and I entered into an agreement on {date} for the purpose of tenancy/service, and my client deposited a sum of ₹{amount} with you for the same.
documents.fact3: 2. That despite vacating the premises/service on the agreed date and fulfilling all obligations, you have failed to {demand} within the legally stipulated timeline.
documents.fact4: 3. That such withholding is illegal, arbitrary, and amounts to "Criminal Breach of Trust" under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (formerly IPC) and specific provisions of the Consumer Protection Act.
documents.fact5: 4. NOW THEREFORE, I hereby demand that you {demand} within {deadline} days from the receipt of this notice.
documents.fact6: FAILURE to comply with the above will leave my client with no option but to initiate legal proceedings in the appropriate Court of Law, and you shall be solely liable for all costs and consequences thereof.

form.addressPlaceholder: Full postal address for receiving response
form.step2Sub: Who are you sending this to?
form.step3Sub: What happened and what do you want?
form.warning: ⚠️ Professional legal documents are drafted based on Indian law. Ensure all information is accurate.

sidebar.evidenceDesc: A formal notice + speed post receipt is 100% vital proof if you later go to court.
sidebar.bilingualDesc: Automatically generate the document in your preferred language to avoid confusion.
sidebar.accuracyDesc: Templates based on CrPC and BNS standards used by Indian High Court lawyers.
sidebar.step2: Send via Speed Post / Registered Post
sidebar.readyDesc: Don't forget to keep the postal receipt. It's your most powerful piece of evidence in court.
sidebar.readGuide: Read our guide on Speed Post

safetyTips.tip1: Never share OTP with anyone, even bank officials
safetyTips.tip2: Always verify callers who claim to be from banks or government
safetyTips.tip3: Report scams within 24 hours at cybercrime.gov.in
